* 不^1，不。

\E2* 唔... 
* 嘿^1，这里面是什么？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3037_0: \E9* 过不了多久你也要去上大学了.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2795_0: * 我不会原谅你们的^1，快滚！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1592_0: \E4* D..^1. did you want to talk about something?/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1600_0:
\E3* 噢-噢^1，你说这些花...^1？

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1601_0: \E0* He..^1. he always asks how you're doing in school.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1602_0: \E7* ..^1. then gives me a bouquet of them./
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1603_0: \E1* ..^1. a-actually, that he always gives me flowers.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1604_0: \E4* ..^1. r-really makes me w-wonder if he..^1. if he l-likes.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1606_0: \EA* ..^1. the awesome comics I lent to him./
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1607_0:
\EB* 说真的^1，他有些方面让我

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1608_0:
\EA* （他体格壮硕^1，
能把我打得满地找牙。）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1613_0:
\E7* 这-这是为我的小猫^1，
喵喵准备的^1！
她是完美的天使！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1615_0:
\E9* 好..^1. 好吧^1，
其实我从来没见-见过她^1，
但-但是.../

\E7* 自从我开始在这里摆牛奶^1，
它就一直在消失。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1617_0:
\E6* 所..^1. 所以我觉得
这里应该有只猫。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1625_0:
\E0* 克..^1. 克里斯^1，即便你
最后还是没拿回粉笔.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1626_0: \E0* 我也该犒劳一下你的努力。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1627_0:
\E3* 所以^1，为了答谢你^1，
我可以借给你^1，嗯.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1628_0: \E0* M..^1. my home-made DVD collection of the Symptons!/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1629_0:
\E7* 你-你知道吧^1，就是那部
描写中产阶级怪物家庭的
情景喜剧。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1631_0:
\E0* 它可是最有趣^1，
而且是金句最多的电视剧了...！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1632_0: \E3* 但你可千万别太抬举第二季 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1633_0:
\E9* 因为刚重启成
《辛普吨一家-涡轮战队》
的时候 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1634_0:
\E8* 内容变成了他们
各自开着机动载具 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1635_0: \E3* 跑去和巨大怪兽战斗什么的 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1636_0: \E9* 最主要的问题在于它有点 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1637_0: \E6* 违背了聚焦于家庭生活的初衷 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1638_0:
\E7* 另一方面他们的载具
却做成了动物造型 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1639_0: \E5* 而且还和动物载具交朋友 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1640_0:
\E3* 也别提什么
《辛普吨-银河之力》了 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1641_0:
\E8* 那里头辛普吨一家
在太阳的另一侧 %
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1643_0:
\E6* 你说这样一来
重力场不就会%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1645_0: \E2* ..^1. you don't want to watch it?/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1651_0:
\E1* 好吧^1，唔^1，如果你
写作业的时候需要帮助.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1652_0: \EA* 我就在这个恶心的小巷里等你。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1653_0: \EB* H..^1. heheheh..^1. umm, tell your mom I said hi./%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1688_0:
* （生命的存在离不开进食。）
* （哪怕是苔藓也要喝水。）/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1694_0:
* （苔藓被吃掉了。）
* （循环得以延续...）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1703_0:
* （你吃掉了苔藓。）
* （尝起来..^1. 藓藓的。）/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1709_0:
* （循环到此为止^1，
在一间小牢房的角落中...）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1739_0: * （铁制镣铐被放进了你的【防具】中。）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1745_0: * （不需要任何东西就能束缚你...）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1754_0:
\E6* ..^1.谢谢你帮助她^1，克里斯^1。
她会很感激的。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1764_0: \E0* 我觉得都可以花点时间.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1765_0:
\E6* 闭上眼睛^1，
想想她现在在做什么.../%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1790_0:
* 啧啧^1。我是铁匠马留斯^1。
我什么都会修理^1。武器^1，防具.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1791_0:
* ..^1.连你也能修理^1！
啧^1，啧^1，有何贵干？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1813_0:
* 哎呀^1，哎呀^1。
你们没有可以修理的东西。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1814_0:
* 但如果你们找到什么坏掉的东西^1，
就来这吧。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1821_0:
* 嗬--^1！那块蛋糕里翻腾着能量^1！
务必让我修好它！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1822_0: * 嗬-哈^1！来感受我的技术吧！/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1828_0:
* 嗬--^1！那块蛋糕里翻腾着能量^1！
务必让我修好它！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1829_0:
* ..^1.但是^1，你的【物品】
也得有空位才行。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1834_0:
* 嗬--^1！那把钥匙里翻腾着能量^1！
务必让我修好它！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1835_0: * 嗬-哈^1！来感受我的技术吧！/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1842_0: * 哎呀^1，哎呀^1。一路顺风^1，我的友人。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1846_0:
* 你的身体^1，也是武器^1。
你们必须要时刻注意维护好它。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1847_0: * 嗬-哈^1！来感受我的技术吧。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1858_0: * 想来一块方钻巧克力吗？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1878_0:
* 谢啦^1，大概吧。
* （方钻巧克力被放进了
你的【物品】中。）/%

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1919_0:
* （心桃好像很开心。）
* （红心甜甜圈被放进了
你的【物品】中。）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1923_0:
* （你的【物品】空间不足。）
* （心桃似乎很伤心。）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1947_0:
\E1* 有兴趣收购一块
兰瑟饼干吗？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1949_0: * 收入都将用于教你们做人。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1971_0:
* （兰瑟饼干被放进了
你的【物品】中。）/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1975_0: * 我们有钱去做不法勾当了！！/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1985_0:
* （你购买了兰瑟饼干。）
* （但你身上没有足够的空间了。）/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1986_0:
* （所以兰瑟把饼干扔到了地上^1，
饼干碎了。）/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1992_0: * 还是要感谢你热心配合.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1996_0: * 这下我们有钱去做不法勾当了！/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2009_0:
* 什么^1？你钱都拿去做啥了！^1？
买糕点！？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2019_0: * 嘿^1！不许不从我们这里买东西！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2021_0:
* 听着笨蛋！
* 这可是为了大义！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2034_0:
\E2* 嘿^1，混球！！！
* 别站在路中间！！！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2036_0: \E1* ..^1. oh, wait, it's just 艾斯戈尔's kid./
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2037_0: \E7* 抱歉^1，我最近有点^1，呃^1，烦躁。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2038_0:
\E2* 这份工作太无聊了。
* 这小镇上从没发生过任何事！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2039_0:
\E4* 嘎..^1. 我真希望发生点
翻天覆地的事！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2040_0:
\E7* ..^1. huh?
* You got somethin' to report?/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2055_0:
\E3* 艾菲斯是谁？
* 完全不知道你在说谁。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2062_0:
\E1* 什么？
* 你说学校里有个暗世界？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2064_0:
\E5* 反正暗世界的存在
不违反任何法律！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2065_0: * 处理它是学校董事会的工作！/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2069_0:
\E6* 嗷^1，你想帮我忙^1？没问题^1，
混球。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2071_0:
\E1* ..^1.等等^1，我们好像连银行
都没有？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2076_0:
\E6* 别做违法的事哦^1，
你个小混球~！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2077_0:
\E3* 还有^1，如果你有关于紫色女孩
的线索就通知我一声。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2078_0:
\E4* 有个紫色女孩
因屡次模仿动画里的
危险恶作剧正被通缉。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2090_0: \E3* 想在我疯掉之前聊个天吗？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2094_0:
\E0* H..^1. hey!
* Hey little buddy!
* What's up?!/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2103_0: \E0* 你知道艾利什么时候回家吗？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2104_0: \E8* Y..^1. you can't tell him this, but I really miss the guy./
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2105_0:
\E8* 要能像以前一样^1，
和他一起在镇上闲逛该多好.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2110_0:
\E2* 但-但有一次安黛因
和我目光接触了！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2117_0: \E0* 我偷懒没几秒就能听见.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2118_0:
\E3* “披E萨里有个E^1，
店员们E起才是披E萨！”/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2119_0:
\E2* 明明有的！ 
* 是你强行把它去掉了！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2120_0:
\E3* 但没事的^1，小家伙。
* 我一直在存钱.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2121_0: \E8* ..^1. to go to college where 艾利 is!/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2122_0:
\E5* 然后我会拿个戏剧专业的学位^1，
当个名声远扬的演员.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2123_0: \E1* 让迷妹们汹涌而来^1，小家伙。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2128_0:
\E1* 啊^1，没错^1，小家伙^1。好主意^1。
来认识下通缉犯们吧。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2129_0:
\E3* 蓝耳 - 痴迷于软冰激凌^1，
没有丝毫个人空间意识。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2130_0:
\E2* 老是不小心把刨冰
倒在我身上^1，还嘿嘿直笑。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2131_0:
\E1* 战士 - 谢天谢地^1，
他因为披萨相关的工伤而缺席。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2132_0: \E2* 每时每刻都在用战吼恐吓顾客。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2133_0:
\E3* 紫人 - 天啦^1，那家伙^1，
你得好好.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2135_0:
\E3* 啊^1，我的同事们^1。
没了他们我能去哪？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2136_0:
\E1* 一个好地方^1，小家伙^1。
一个好得多的地方。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2141_0:
\E3* 没事^1，小家伙^1。
你不用看着我遭受苦难。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2142_0:
\E1* 好好享受自由吧..^1.
趁你还没失去它.../%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2151_0:
* 克里斯..^1. what a pleasant surprise to see you here.
* And on a school day./
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2152_0:
* 你现在这个时候过来
肯定有什么原因吧。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2153_0:
* 我^1，埃尔文神父^1，殷切地希望... 
* 如果你有任何精神负担的话^1，
请一定要^1，向我倾诉。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2160_0:
* 克里斯^1，想喝我们“奇葩”的果汁
的话^1，你就应该来参加礼拜。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2161_0:
* 我们的唱诗班自从你哥哥离开后
音色就稍显不够丰满了。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2162_0:
* 克里斯^1，如果你能来和我们一起唱
就再好不过了。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2163_0: * 哪怕只是随便参与一下。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2164_0:
* 也总比一门心思
就想喝那果汁来得好。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2168_0:
* 我明白了。
* 希望终有一天你能寻找到
想要倾诉的话语。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2169_0: * 愿天使之力照亮你的前路。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2185_0:
* （你把棉花糖味的那支挖出来
并朝着笔尖哈气。）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2189_0: * （反正那支巧克力味的闻起来太假了。）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2228_0:
* （医院的公用钢琴^1，
为了能放在角落里而做得很小。）/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2229_0: * （后果就是^1，很多常用音阶都没了。）/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2243_0:
* （你的双手在琴键上徘徊^1，
一个键也没按。）/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2252_0:
\E3* 我坐在车里等你放学
等了半个小时了...！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2253_0:
\E7* 我电话打了又打^1，
但你一直不接.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2254_0: \E8* 可让你可怜的妈妈担心死了！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2255_0: \E7* 克里斯^1，我恐怕不得不罚你.../
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2258_0: \E0* 你之前在陪你的..^1. 朋友？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2262_0: * 你们可以继续在外面玩一玩。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2271_0:
很高兴
又见到
你了
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2287_0:
\E2* 是啊^1，可不嘛^1，
是挺开心的！/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2288_0:
\E5* 尤其咱们俩之前
都没见过面。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2289_0:
\E0* 叫我杉斯吧。
* 骷髅杉斯。
* 我是新搬来城里的。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2295_0:
\E3* 嗯..^1. 你还别说^1，
问到点子上了。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2296_0:
\E5* 我是杉斯。
* 你友善的骷髅邻居。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2318_0:
\E2* 你问我身后的？
* 没错^1，这儿就是杂货店。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2320_0:
\E2* 太让人头疼了。
* 我还想买几盒牛奶呢。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2321_0:
\E5* 快点来个人跟这家店的
老板抱怨两句吧。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2325_0:
\E0* 我们刚搬过来^1，
所以还没有什么熟人。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2326_0:
\E2* 怎么^1，
你有人介绍给我认识吗？/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2335_0:
\E2* 总之^1，我会在一直站在这里
无所事事的。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2345_0:
\E2* 啊^1，不好意思^1。
我是不会跟智障婴儿
出去玩的。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2346_0: \E5* 跟我的社会生态位不合。/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2351_0:
\E5* 喂^1，
我都把号码给你了^1，
你还想怎么样？/%
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2356_0:
\E2* 哇啊^1，打住^1，
你肉食系吗。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2357_0:
\E0* 你可不能直接就跨上
友谊的小船。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2362_0: \E5* 你随时都可以打这个号码。/
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2374_0:
\E5* 昨天夜里我已经
和你妈妈“交上朋友”了。/

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2596_0:

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2599_0:

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2600_0:

obj_ch5_DW27_slash_Step_0_gml_404_0: * Maybe I did tease you too much./

obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_129_0: \Vg* 克里斯..^1. 苏西..^1. 利艾尔斯./%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_137_0: * The Fountain's just a step away now./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_278_0: * Fate should say we are destined to fight.../
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_279_0: * But..^1. I believe in you three./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_280_0: * I believe you have the power to change that fate./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_282_0: * Or will you prove your fantasy stronger than ours?/%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_447_0: * So you made up your minds.../%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_465_0: * Since the beginning, we were love.../
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_466_0: * Your father grew us, a rainbow bouquet of seven flowers.../
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_467_0: * As a proposal to your mother./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_468_0: * Flowers, that were only supposed to live for one smiling day.../%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_496_0: * And yet, he did not let us go. He kept us alive, alongside his love.../
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_497_0: * Every day, he watered us. He talked to us. He sang his dreams to us./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_498_0: * And each day, we wished we could do something in return./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_499_0: * His friend grew sick, and we could do nothing./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_500_0: * His money ran out, and we could do nothing./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_501_0: * His family left him..^1. and we could do nothing./
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_502_0: * And yet he still cared for us...!/
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_503_0: * Weak, useless flowers..^1. flowers that could do nothing in return!/%
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_532_0: * But now..^1. our time has come! For flowers to be the heroes!/
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_533_0: * And build a world..^1. where all his kindness may be repaid!/
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_534_0: * 克里斯! This is your final chance!/
obj_ch5_DW29_slash_Step_0_gml_535_0: * If you really believe your world is better.../
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_75_0: \EM* It's not right!! We have to defeat you!!! We have to!!!/

obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_264_0: \El* Not just you, but..^1. everyone, as well./%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_551_0: \Ei* 克里斯..^1. I'm sorry. I'm sorry for not realizing sooner./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_552_0: \El* When 艾斯利尔 comes home.../
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_553_0: \EI* ..^1. I would love to see the both of you together./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_554_0: \E3* Even..^1. without your mother, if she prefers./%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_591_0: \El* It seems that while I wasn't looking.../%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_684_0: \Em* 克里斯..^1. it's your time now./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_709_0: \EI* What about..^1. the diner!? What about skateboards!?/%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_718_0: \E7* ..^1. you do know I was just playing along, right?/

obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_722_0: \E7* How it feels, to receive..^1. such unasked-for affection./%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_750_0: \EK* You didn'托..^1. actually like my mixtape?/
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_752_0: \E2* Well..^1. I did. It was, well, very thoughtful./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_753_0: \E3* At times, you seemed..^1. like a really lovely person./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_756_0: \EJ* 艾斯戈尔, listen! This world, it's perfect for you!/
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_757_0: \EI* I've seen how alone you are! You want to go BACK!?/%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_775_0: \E7* Flowery. Even if I wanted to..^1. I couldn't stay./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_779_0: \E2* Back in the real world, my shop is waiting./
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_780_0: \E3* It's not right to leave it empty./%
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_805_0: \E0* Someone has to take care of the flowers./

obj_ch5_DW30_flashback_slash_Create_0_gm: * 克里斯.
* ..^1. ever since that horrible day...
* I've..^1. only blamed myself for what happened.
* All I ever wanted
* Was to prove it wasn't my fault.
* To make sure that it would never happen again.
* That it was all because of...
* This.
* The "Dark World."
* ..^1. but now that I'm finally here...
* It makes me realize
* How pointless that all was.
* None of you ever blamed me.
* None of you ever said it was my fault.
* Even so..^1. seeing the aftermath of my failure...
* Made my self-hatred consume me.
* One..^1. that ultimately drove your mother away.
* I thought if I could just prove it..^1. prove I was right.
* It would fix everything.
* But even when I finally found that "proof" I wanted...
* ..^1. I still failed to protect you.

obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_146_0: * O, who does audience in this place?/

obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_209_0: * I've never seen a sunset so breathtaking.../

obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_217_0: * Here, the sunset shines from the back of your eyes, like the afterglow of a light you stared at too long./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_227_0: * Right, of course, I'm also human. That's why I look and feel like a flower./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_229_0: * I suppose..^1. it depends on the color of the sunset./%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_233_0: * Names, names, names! That's what everyone always thinks about./

obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_246_0: * Yes, you're nodding. Obviously you agree. Obviously./%

obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_259_0: * Me? I've..^1. never been able to talk to him. For..^1. obvious reasons./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_260_0: * I know. It's selfish, if you say it out loud. Everything..^1. has been thanks to him./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_261_0: * Until now, I..^1. I couldn't really think about that./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_263_0: * I can think now, though. I'll do my best to fit in and help, too./%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_267_0: * Up until now, I don't think I realized what loneliness was./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_268_0: * Now, looking at the sunrise, I finally noticed it. That pang in my heart.../
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_269_0: * ..^1. I'm going to make friends here. I know it. Lots and lots of friends.../%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_278_0: * I guess..^1. I'll be "graduating" from here soon./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_279_0: * I..^1. I'm not just ready to leave my friends behind yet.../
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_280_0: * But, is that something..^1. anyone is ever ready for?/%
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_284_0: * If you "seal the Fountain"..^1. I won't stick around./
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_285_0: * I'll..^1. need some time to myself, I think./

obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_270: * Yeah..^1. I'm still thinking about when we voted as kids./

obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_276: * ..^1. and then when we got on.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_277: * You just shook it, over and over and over again./

obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_342: * Gosh, you haven't grown up one bit, have you, 克里斯?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_358: * ..^1. really wanted to win in the first place, did you./
